text:
Edwin Groothuis schrieb am 10.09.2008 00:08 (localtime):
> Maintainer of www/xpi-speed-dial,
>

> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Yep, the update should be commited.
And yes, I'd like to change my e-mail address

Thanks,

-Harry
